Spirit of the Howler  

Description

1: Summon Pet: PCPetShmS11L055WolfGho

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 650 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 12 Recast Time: 24
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You summon a howling spirit.
Cast on other: Soandso summons a howling spirit.

Game Description

Summons a companion from the spirit world in the form of a great wolf.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Spirit of the Howler

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Spirit of the Howler
ClassLevel
SHM55
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (16)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (20)
  • Crafted (1)

# Jul 27 2008 at 4:22 AM Rating: Decent

This spell also drops from an "old Wurm" in skyfire mountains. Just got my spell from this one after hours and hours hunting the other mobs listed for this spell...
▲ Page top
huh
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2007 at 2:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593369533777
4 posts
wats lv49 up
▲ Page top
Sad...
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2005 at 3:02 PM Rating: Excellent
Zaggran
Scholar
86 posts
The numbers..

Pet Level
-----
Frenzied Spirit: 36
Spirit of the Howler: 39
True Spirit: 58

HP
-----
Frenzied Spirit: 1800
Spirit of the Howler: 2050
True Spirit: 2050

HP Regen/tick
-----
Frenzied Spirit: 30
Spirit of the Howler: 30
True Spirit: 80

Max hit
-----
Frenzied Spirit: 51
Spirit of the Howler: 53
True Spirit: 60

Max Kick
-----
Frenzied Spirit: 23
Spirit of the Howler: 24
True Spirit: 24

Abilities
-----
Frenzied Spirit: Double Attack, Riposte, Shield
Spirit of the Howler: Double Attack, Riposte, Shield
True Spirit: Double Attack, Riposte, Shield, Enrage, Parry

Also the price is a factor. Spirit of the Howler is the most expensive Shaman pet. At least on all the servers I've been on. And as you can see by the numbers it's a rather minor upgrade. It starts out light blue and before you get to True Spirit it'll turn green. Even when I was fighting light blues at 60 he was missing constantly. I had him hasted with SLTW from my ornate and wearing a muzzle of mardu, giving him 71% haste vs. a 75% slowed mob and me not swinging a weapon. My screen was literally spammed with him whiffing. I didn't parse it but from eyeing it I'd guess he had about 30% accuracy. Again, this was against light blues at 60.

My advice... if you mostly group, don't bother with this spell unless the cost is nothing to you. If you mostly solo (and I don't know why you would) then weigh the benefits vs. the cost carefully. He really isn't much of an upgrade over the 49 pet and you've got a lot of other expensive spells to buy in the near future. In either case I wouldn't recommend camping for it. It's far from a common drop and your time would be better spent hunting in better exp areas and getting to True Spirit faster.
▲ Page top

This sold for 5k on morden rasp back when i was in my 30's to my late 40's, it was always for sell. now that i am 55 i cant find it anywhere. i have camped all the named mobs in burning woods and not a single one droped this after an hour with each mob..... frustrating beyond beleif

▲ Page top
Drop
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2003 at 2:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760960545
View User Forum
4 posts
Got about 4 in one night hunting for shards in Skyfire off random mobs / named / Wurms.

53 / 54 shammy can easily solo there with a bit of care, I had 4 drop for me along with a pile of mage spells and others.

If you are looking for spell drops in general try hunting in Skyfire you'll be happy you did.

Just watch out for the Chromodrac's they agro a fair way's off and AOE dispell -- Can strip you buffless in seconds.

Hope this helps a few people.

Seuade 55 Shammy of Drinal
▲ Page top
Pet
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2003 at 1:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759618801
10 posts
I have seens this spell 3 times on Prexus in Bazaar 1 for 13k and others around 10k.They have to be nuts, but I don't see them for sale anymore so I guess they are selling them...I wish i could afford it but, oh well. Besides after reading what you all have to say about this spell I think i might just wait til I get my next pet spell.Also i have killed Gullerback about 6 times w/help and no drop...

~~56 Shaman~~

MORE HP
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2003 at 9:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776651483
53 posts
I have found this pet has more HP than the 49 pet. He hits for 53 ( I know...49 pet hits for 51) but he hits around 50 more often than the 49 pet. Other than that i don't see much diference. If you don't have it yet..personally I wouldn't spend my money on it. Use the 49 pet til 61. Anyways, I hope this helps someone out :)

Gofac Urseff
55 Shaman
Crimson Dragons
Fennin Ro
